# Thanapat Pirmphol

Thanapat Pirmphol is a CTO, blockchain engineer, and product-minded builder focused on trusted digital infrastructure for water markets, regulated systems, sustainable systems, and agentic AI engineering workflows.

## Canonical URL

https://www.oadtz.com/

## Current Role

Chief Technology Officer at Water Ledger Global.

## Core Topics

- Blockchain infrastructure
- Water markets and water accounting
- Regulated digital platforms
- Technical leadership
- Agentic AI and AI agents
- Enterprise software architecture
- Sustainable systems
